$schema.description: JSON Schema URI for this document.

generated_at_utc.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp indicating when this coverage report was generated.

project_graph_id.description: Optional stable identifier from plan_graph/index.json that this coverage report was generated against. Omit if not available.

requirements.description: One entry per requirement ID discovered in REQUIREMENTS.md (or referenced by plan nodes).

req_id.description: Unique requirement identifier matching FR-###, NFR-###, or REQ-### format.

description.description: Requirement text extracted from REQUIREMENTS.md. May be empty string if not yet extracted.

node_ids.description: List of plan graph node_ids (from project_plan_node.schema.json) whose requirement_refs include this req_id.

items.description: A plan node node_id that references this requirement.

acceptance_check_ids.description: List of check_ids from acceptance_manifest.json that explicitly cover this requirement.

items.description: An acceptance_manifest check_id that maps to this requirement.

coverage_status.description: Coverage classification: 'covered' = ≥1 node_id AND ≥1 acceptance_check_id; 'partially_covered' = ≥1 node_id but 0 acceptance_check_ids; 'uncovered' = 0 node_ids.

uncovered_requirements.description: Flat list of req_ids whose coverage_status is 'uncovered' (no plan nodes reference them).

items.description: A requirement ID with no associated plan graph nodes.

orphaned_node_requirement_refs.description: Plan node requirement_refs that cite a req_id not present in REQUIREMENTS.md.

node_id.description: The plan node that contains the orphaned reference.

req_id.description: The req_id cited by the plan node that cannot be found in REQUIREMENTS.md.

reason.description: Fixed sentinel value indicating the req_id is not defined in REQUIREMENTS.md.

uncovered_acceptance.description: Requirements that have at least one plan node but no acceptance_check_ids mapping to them.

req_id.description: The requirement that has plan coverage but no acceptance check coverage.

node_ids.description: Plan node IDs that reference this requirement but no acceptance check covers it.

items.description: A plan node node_id referencing this requirement.

reason.description: Fixed sentinel value indicating no acceptance_manifest entry covers this requirement.

summary.description: Aggregate counts across all requirements for quick dashboard display.

total_requirements.description: Total number of unique requirement IDs in REQUIREMENTS.md.

covered.description: Count of requirements with coverage_status = 'covered' (≥1 node_id AND ≥1 acceptance_check_id).

partially_covered.description: Count of requirements with coverage_status = 'partially_covered' (≥1 node_id, 0 acceptance_check_ids).

uncovered.description: Count of requirements with coverage_status = 'uncovered' (0 node_ids).

orphaned_refs.description: Total count of orphaned_node_requirement_refs entries (plan nodes referencing unknown req_ids).

uncovered_acceptance_count.description: Count of uncovered_acceptance entries (requirements with nodes but no acceptance checks).
